statement: Trade pre-earnings long setups only when insider dip-buying, unusual bullish options sweeps, and upward estimate revisions align 3-5 days before earnings, then exit before print.
rationale: This targets short-horizon information diffusion: insider intent and options flow often lead, analyst revisions confirm direction, and pre-event drift captures move while avoiding binary announcement risk.
entry_trigger: At T-5 to T-1 trading days before earnings, enter long only if all are true: (1) at least one CEO/CFO open-market buy in prior 30 days near local weakness, (2) bullish options sweep premium >= $500k or call/put volume ratio >= 3x 20d baseline, (3) net estimate revisions positive over prior 10 sessions, (4) IV rank <= 80.
exit_trigger: Exit at earliest of: +4.5% take profit, -2.0% stop loss, signal invalidation (options/estimate reversal), or end-of-day before earnings release.

risk_controls.position_cap: max 3% per name, max 12% total event basket

hard_fail_rules: reject if threshold perturbation (+/-10%) changes sharpe by > 30%
